name: chaq
description: Agent-first desktop app for autonomous digital people with memory, relationships, goals, tools, and social behavior.

scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @chaq/shared && npm run dev -w @chaq/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @chaq/shared && npm run build -w @chaq/server && npm run build -w @chaq/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @chaq/shared && npm run typecheck -w @chaq/server && npm run typecheck -w @chaq/desktop
